hero.title: Document Expiry Tracker
hero.description: A private workspace for tracking passport, ID, licence, permit, insurance, certificate, and other personal document expiry dates.

flow.title: Documents → Expiry Dashboard → Insights
steps: Review computed expiry status and reminder windows
Archive, restore, or renew records when needed
Use insights to spot expired and upcoming documents

differences.title: Expiry tracking without pretending to renew for you
differences.description: Document Expiry Tracker keeps the renewal plan organized while leaving official renewal actions outside the product boundary.

items.title: Record
items.description: Store title, type, number, authority, country, dates, reminder window, tags, and notes.

items.title: Review
items.description: See Active, Expiring Soon, Expired, Archived, no-expiry, and upcoming expiry windows.

items.title: Renew
items.description: Mark a document renewed by updating issue and expiry dates while keeping the record in place.

feel.title: A calm place for important dates
feel.description: The workflow is designed for users who need to see what is expiring without scanning documents, sending alerts, or connecting government services.

items.title: Private
items.description: Records are owner-scoped and live inside the protected Ansiversa workflow.

items.title: Practical
items.description: The first screen opens directly to document management and next renewal actions.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No OCR, notifications, email, SMS, calendar sync, or official renewal integrations are included in V1.

audiences.title: Who uses Document Expiry Tracker
audiences.description: Document Expiry Tracker supports households and individuals managing personal expiry dates.

items.title: Frequent travelers
items.description: Track passports, visas, residence permits, and travel-related document dates.

items.title: Households
items.description: Keep family document expiry dates visible in one protected workspace.

items.title: Everyday planners
items.description: Track licences, insurance, memberships, certificates, and custom documents.

resourceSection.title: Document records that stay easy to review
resourceSection.description: V1 focuses on manually entered metadata and computed expiry states.

items.title: Document facts
items.description: Title, type, number, authority, country, issue date, expiry date, notes, and tags.

items.title: Expiry dashboard
items.description: Active, expiring soon, expired, archived, upcoming 7/30/90 days, and no-expiry counts.

items.title: Renewal actions
items.description: Archive, restore, delete, and mark renewed with updated date fields.

groupedSection.title: A focused renewal-planning workflow
groupedSection.description: Each section supports one part of the document expiry planning job.

items.name: Documents
items.description: Create, edit, search, filter, archive, restore, renew, and delete personal document records.

items.name: Expiry windows
items.description: Review documents by upcoming 7, 30, and 90 day periods, expired records, and no-expiry records.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Review type distribution, country distribution, and upcoming renewals.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Document Expiry Tracker follows protected mini-app routing, isolated API data, generated API types, and shared shell navigation.
items: Owner-scoped backend records in an isolated Documents table.

finalCta.title: Open Document Expiry Tracker
finalCta.description: Start with your documents, then review expiry windows and insights.
